title: Summary quality
description: Checks whether a chapter summary is faithful and useful for later processing.

checks.title: Completeness
checks.question: Does the summary preserve the key events and context from the source?

checks.title: No hallucinations
checks.question: Does the summary avoid adding facts not present in the source?

checks.title: Future context
checks.question: Would this summary be useful as context for processing later story parts?
